programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Santoshi Maa
programme.desc: Santoshi Maa is a Hindi spiritual drama television series starring Gracy Singh, Ratan Rajput and Ayaz Ahmed. The story revolves around Santoshi, a kind-hearted devotee of Goddess Santoshi Maa

programme.title: Mrs.Kaushik Ki Paanch Bahuyein
programme.desc: Mr and Mrs Kaushik have five sons, all of whom are married and well settled. However, their journey gets intriguing as they welcome five daughters-in-law, all from different cultural backgrounds.

programme.title: Naagin Vaadon Ki Agnipariksha
programme.desc: Naaginn is a Hindi supernatural drama television series starring Khushi Dubey, Sayantani Ghosh and Manav Gohil. The story revolves around a serpent, Amrita, who transforms into a woman to avenge the death of her parents

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: " Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child' s play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. " Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Making World Map Felt
programme.desc: The Savannah Kids experience enlightens both the spirit and the soul, aiming to bond and delight families entrancing and entertaining, inspiring young minds.Beautifully crafted sceneries transport the audience to magical realities and create fantastical memories! Stories are acted out in exquisite costumes with puppets and props which come to life before your eyes and encourage the viewer to use their imagination!The productions feature original handmade sets, captivating vocal performances of original music as well as loved Disney and musical theatre classics, cheeky puppet shows, and inventive storytelling. Through an innovative, educational experience, the productions expose children to the English language in an enchanting and inventive way. They encourage good moral values, creativity and using your imagination!Savannah Zwi is a musician, actress, and artist.

programme.title: One Million Subscribers Play Button Day
programme.desc: THANK YOU ALL so much for helping me reach my goal of 1 million subscribers! My new play button came in today's vlog! I know a lot of you asked to see it when it came, so I hope you love the vlog!

programme.title: Awkward Hilarious Principal Visit The Mean Teacher

programme.title: Official Adoption and Name Reveal For Our New Puppy
programme.desc: It's official! We are officially adopting this adorable American Akita who didn't have a home and we have given him the perfect name!! Thank you all for helping us make this decision! You all liked my top 3 names and that's what we ended up going with, although there were so many great suggestions I would love to use on future dogs!``

programme.title: I Got a Baby Sister
programme.desc: I've always wanted a baby sister and I finally got one! Now I'm so lucky to have a little brother and a little sister!

programme.title: I have a huge Fox Collection
programme.desc: Some of you may already know that I have a MAJOR fox obsession, and you've been asking to see more of it, so today I'm showing you my entire collection. Hope you enjoy the vlog!

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan
programme.desc: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan is a culinary history show that explores the food of the royals and their erstwhile states. The show takes it's viewers through an amazing journey of anecdotes, folktales, architecture, art, history and landscape and delves into the unique customs and traditions of the various provinces. All these culminate into beautiful renditions of the recipes unique to those regions. This new season of Raja Rasoi aur Anya Kahaniyaan focuses on the royal families as protagonists and explores their personal stories and journeys that shaped their present day food practices.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: In India's Ladakh, rising temperatures are leading to glacial melt and water shortages in the mountains of the Himalayas. The Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan is also sturggling as it experiences severe drought.

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: Every year seven million people die from air pollution. It's the world's biggest environmental killer.

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: In South Africa and Nepal, earthrise looks at food production solutions being developed to help with adjusting to new conditions.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahu's North Shore, and filming George surfing with the “Hawaian Fire” firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Mt.Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here's the first kicker:High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In June of next year we plan to intercept the Monsoon as it hits southern India and makes its way north along the western shore past Goa and Mumbai up to Delhi.This most famous of torrential rainy seasons drops as much as 40 feet of water.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The most notorious volcanic explosion in history came from the small island of Krakatoa, off the coast of Java. The tiny island was pulverized and the giant explosion was felt half way around the world. Java is at the heart of the Ring of Fire.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Northern Iceland has many of the wild features that we love – volcanoes, glaciers, avalanches, mudslides, big waves, and extreme marine weather. All that – plus weird red and green lights dancing around in the winter sky!

programme.title: Wonder
programme.desc: In this episode we'll understand how chromatic adaptation works, how do we see the color pink and why do blue rarely exists in nature.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: The monsoon finally breaks, signaling the end of the drought and the beginning of a season of plenty, leading to celebrations from monkeys and people alike!

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: As India's government clamps down on marauding macaques in the capital, Delhi, the troublemaker Zamir steals ice cream from a child, bringing the country's leading monkey catcher racing back to Jaipur.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: Cunning Zamir finds himself a new troop to join, while little Kavi is prepared for release back onto Jaipur's streets.

programme.title: Doug to the Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of expert animal rescuer, Aja Estro, Doug continues his tireless search and rescue missions across the town of Lake Charles following Hurrican Laura.

programme.title: Doug to the Rescue
programme.desc: Doug ventures into the charred neighborhoods of Talented, OR with an old friend, Shannon Jay, to save any of the unlucky felines left behind in the wildlife evacuations.

programme.title: Doug to the Rescue
programme.desc: Doug is called to Puerto Rico to help old friend and rescue partner, Aja Estro, with the massive stray dog population and hoarding cases across the island.

programme.title: Race of Life
programme.desc: Insects thrive in the relentless Race of Life, with diverse shapes and colors aiding their success.

programme.title: Race of Life

programme.title: The Great Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: Michaela Strachan takes things to the next level as she signs up as a volunteer on Africa's biggest penguin rescue mission. Will Michaela be able to cope and takes on the care of hundreds of abandoned penguin chicks at the SANCCOB sea bird hospital?

programme.title: The Great Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: Michaela is reaching the end of her training at the SANCCOB sea bird hospital with the angry oiled adult penguins, but just as she feels she is getting the hang of things the abandoned chicks start piling into the centre and stakes get higher.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: We follow the as they walk and stalk. Meat preparation gets weird for some as our volunteers make dinner time more interesting. A brave zebra stallion takes the fight to the ever confident lions. Wakanaka proves her predatory prowess.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Campania's beautiful coastline is filled with two things: tourists and seafood. Diving into the culture of the region, Celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini begins his meal with a salad from the Island of Capri. Putting a twist on the classic dish, Michael's Grilled Caprese Salad combines fresh tomatoes, tangy balsamic, and a hint of sweetness from basil. For his primo, Michael serves up bold flavours with his Spaghetti Puttanesca. Mixing salty and sweet, this sauce offers a delicious take on the typical plate of spaghetti. Looking to the coast for his secondo, Michael quickly cooks up aromatic and spicy Herb-stuffed Scallops and Grilled Broccoli Rabe. For his dolce Michael whips up a dessert made for a celebration: Rum Babas. Typically for special occasions, each bite of Rum Babas offers pure sweetness with a fresh citrus zest.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini delves into the Italian region of Emilia- Romagna to discover its iconic cuisine. To start, Michael stays light with an airy Mortadella Mousse spread on fluffy Modena Mini Flatbreads. Next, Michael cooks up Tortellini in Broth, a dish originally from Bologna that can be easily altered to personal taste. Michael chooses to fill his tortellini with a rich and savoury mixture of prosciutto, mortadella, and ground pork. For his secondo, Michael uses traditional ingredients and pairs them in a tart, luxurious dish of Duck Breast with Balsamic Cherry Sauce. To wind down his meal, Michael whips up a creamy classic, Rice Custard Cake topped with a Cherry Glaze.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini explores sweet and spicy dishes hailing from the coastal region of Calabria. For his antipasto, Michael cooks up a light and refreshing Brioche with Gelato. Fluffy brioche buns surround the sweet flavours of gelato for a delicious start to your meal. Switching to spice for the primo, Michael introduces a Spicy Sausage and Ricotta Pasta. Full of sweet, savoury, and spicy flavours, this dish provides a strong, flavourful meal sure to please any crowd. For his secondo, Michael goes for a hearty Lamb au Gratin with Peas and Asparagus a classic holiday dish that will warm any room. For his finale, Michael whips up a simple, yet impressive, Chocolate-covered Figs.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Full of luxurious treats, the northern Italian region of Lombardy offers rich and delicious cuisine. For his antipasto, celebrity chef Michael Bonacini prepares a delicate dish of Stuffed Squash Blossoms. Soft and light, these blossoms are enhanced with a creamy filling of parmesan, anchovies, and nutmeg. Following the fresh taste of flowers, Michael cooks up an impressive and rich Risotto Milanese. A feast for your eyes and taste buds, this risotto is coloured by saffron and its floral strands release flavour and colour as it's cooked. For his secondo Michael pairs a succulent Veal Roast with the sweet and sour Mustard Fruit to bring out a tangy delight. Michael's dolce looks solely at chocolate, creating a creamy and crunchy Chocolate Salami. Full of nuts, cookies, and creamy chocolate, this rich dessert is a wonderful way to finish off any meal.

programme.title: City of Venice, Italy (Part 2)
programme.desc: Celebrated throughout the world for its singular beauty, discover Venice and some of its famous places. An open-air museum that seems to float on its lagoon, and a World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. It retains the ancient cultural values and still maintains its traditional style while rejecting the technology that has changed everything.

programme.title: Sifnos, Cyclades island, Greece
programme.desc: An elegant island, symbolic of the Cyclades, discover the Greek island of Sifnos, full of contrasts, where the most arid mountains rub shoulders with the greenest valleys, and where monasteries dominate sandy beaches.

programme.title: Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris. These ancient city walls are some of the best-preserved in the country.

programme.title: Tallinn town, Estonia
programme.desc: Entering now in the Old Town of Tallinn, we understand how it became the best-preserved medieval city in Northern Europe, boasting Gothic spires, winding cobblestone streets, and enchanting architecture.Tallinn, the capital of Estonia, is a city out of a fairytale with centuries of history and traditions.

programme.title: Church of Nativity, Israel
programme.desc: The Church of The Nativity is situated in Betlehem to the south of Jerusalem.In 327 the church of Nativity was commissioned by Constantine the Great and his mother Helena over the site that was traditionally considered to be located over the cave that mar"&"ks the birthplace of Jesus…

programme.title: Temple of Sri Kailawasanathan Swami Devasthanam, Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Temple of Sri Kailawasanathan Swami Devasthanam Kovil is located in Colombo. The temple of Sri Kailawasanathan Swami DevasthanamKovil is one of the most beautiful and lovely attraction places of Sri Lanka. There are many beautiful and elegant paintings of God and Goddesss. Also there are an beautiful carvings of an astrology chart.

programme.title: Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, Italy
programme.desc: Hidden in the hills of Italy lies Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, the Ducal Palace of Urbino. It may seem strange to find such grand Renaissance architecture outside of the great cities. We all know about Rome, Venice, Florence and their great works. But the Ducal Palace of Urbino is often forgotten, despite rivaling all of them with its splendor and great history.

programme.title: Mir Castle Complex, Belarus
programme.desc: Located in the small town center, Mir Castle's complex is one of the earliest monuments to exist to this day and the most essential. This centuries-old Castle, reflected magnificently in an adjoining pond, resembles a building straight out of fairy tales. The common name 'mir' shared by the Castle and the town literally translates to 'peace' this justifies the fact that the Castle's sole purpose was built to bring harmony and peace to the region, followed by the signing of several peace treaties.

programme.title: Ling Sen Tong Temple, Malaysia
programme.desc: Follow the path that leads you to a picturesque garden with a beautiful pond at the centre. Located at the bottom of a limestone hill in Ipoh in Malaysia, Ling Sen Tong temple is a magnificent Taoist cave temple. Decorated with various statues of deities, animals and other Chinese folklore characters amidst the stalagmites and stalactites, this temple boasts of a majestic structure...

programme.title: Arkady Monastery, Greece
programme.desc: The Arkadi Monastery situated on the island of Crete, in Rethymno, doesn't solely belong to this island it belongs to Greece, Europe, and to all five continents. It is a Heritage Site proclaimed European Monument of Freedom.

programme.title: HOTELS on the French Riviera
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Macao and Hong Kong.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Phoenix, Arizona is a place known for the great outdoors—it's desert landscape and year round sunshine is so restorative that one of the world's most famous architects wintered here, designing his own home to bring the outdoors in. But even indoors, this city's offerings shine brilliantly. From a one of kind museum dedicated to musical instruments, to a 50-year-old theater company, and a food and drink scene that comes from the heart, the nation's fifth largest city offers many personal, inspiring experiences. See why Phoenix, Arizona is a place to love. (S1 E18)

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Savannah, Georgia, is a destination that hardly needs an introduction. Just saying the name conjures up images of dripping Spanish moss, historic squares, and elegant architecture. It's a place where art and creativity is embedded into the very fiber of the people. Whether it's diving into the city's history, checking out its vibrant riverfront, enjoying local businesses, or learning the true meaning of leadership, join me as I see what makes Savannah a Place to Love. (S1 E06)

programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”
